overview: An Omegle-style random video chat app where users are instantly paired with a random stranger for an ephemeral live video session. Features Internet Identity login, a split-screen video interface with picture-in-picture, mic/camera controls, and a modern glassmorphism design optimized for mobile.
features: Random instant matching — get paired with a stranger in seconds
Live split-screen video chat with picture-in-picture local preview
Mic and camera toggles with live on/off state
Next button to skip and re-match with someone new
Ephemeral sessions — nothing saved after disconnect
Glassmorphism mobile-first design with animated gradient background
Internet Identity login — no password needed
